concepts.title: Frobenius elements
concepts.blurb: Unramified primes define conjugacy classes in Galois groups via Frobenius action.

concepts.title: Splitting types: split, inert, ramified
concepts.blurb: Unramified primes in a Galois extension come in a small zoo of splitting behaviours — completely split, inert, or partially split — each recorded by a cycle shape of Frobenius.

concepts.title: Decomposition and inertia groups
concepts.blurb: The stabiliser of a prime above p is its decomposition group; its kernel onto the residue-field Galois group is the inertia subgroup, and Frobenius is the generator of the quotient.

concepts.title: Chebotarev density
concepts.blurb: Primes equidistribute across Frobenius conjugacy classes with predicted densities.

concepts.title: Reciprocity toward Artin maps
concepts.blurb: Global reciprocity reframes splitting laws as characters of idèle-like class groups.
